title: 日本ダービーの後に・ノイズ

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I heard her voice while I was running.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: DEEERRRBYYY!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can't count how many times all her silly yelling
has cheered me up.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But today, it terrified me.

The audience celebrates Biwa Hayahide's first
place victory with raucous applause, but she
hardly seems to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... Huff... Gasp...

text_block_list.name: Blond-haired Spectator
text_block_list.text: I can't believe it! Biwa Hayahide won the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Long-haired Spectator
text_block_list.text:
And she did it like it was nothing! Taking the
Kikuka Sho will be child's play for her!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Cough! Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(What are they saying? I had to use every ounce
of strength just to win this race by the skin of my
teeth!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (And the Kikuka Sho is an even longer distance!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Grr! I won't lose next time! I swear I'll be faster!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Nggghhh! Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (They're too much for me!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... Thanks.

She's quiet again. For someone who just won the
Derby, she sure doesn't seem very happy.

I try to think of what to say to cheer her up, but
before I can, a voice cuts through the air.

text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Winning Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wait, aren't you with...

text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I'm with the Winning Step Weekly!
Do you have some time for an interview?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sure, I don't mind! Sorry I kept turning you down!

text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, not at all! So tell me, how did you feel
about the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I loved it. All that excitement and cheering? It was awesome! I felt like I was in a dream... But you know what?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It was even better than a dream!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...Even though I lost.

text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text: Well, there's always next time...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's okay. I tried my best. Winning the
Derby's been my dream for so long, and I trained
as hard as I could for it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... So y'know... sniff... I'm pretty disappointed right now, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'll win the next one for sure! Hic!
A while later...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you have a minute?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I think I may... be scared... of Ticket and Taishin.

She stammers her words as if she has to wring
them out of herself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've been scared of Taishin since the Satsuki Sho,
and Ticket since the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've come up with so many different formulas, but
those two just refuse to fit into any of them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And I can't figure out if it's because my
calculations are incomplete... or if it's because
they have something in them that I don't.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I know I'm being ridiculous... I mean, I already
won the Derby!
choice_data_list: You're not being ridiculous at all.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But...
choice_data_list:
Recognizing your weaknesses is the first step to
growing stronger.

Recognizing your weaknesses is the first step to
growing stronger.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
choice_data_list: So let's figure out what it is you're missing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Okay!
We stay and talk in the waiting room for a while.

We talk about why she's afraid of Narita Taishin
and Winning Ticket, and what she thinks the
difference between her and them might be.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I... I wish I had the kind of strength that they do.
Then I could acquire the thing I'm lacking.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch... I'm fine. I can keep going.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You saw Hayahide's race. She was amazing. I want
to win harder than ever, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I tried my best. Winning the Derby's been my
dream for so long, and I trained as hard as I could
for it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: The iron will to improve... no matter what it takes.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I have a favor to ask you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Going forward, don't be afraid to push me to my limits. In fact, I want you to make me work harder.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My body can handle the pressure. I'm stronger
than I was as a child.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And I refuse to lose! I have to push myself harder
than ever!

Even after we return from the Tokyo Racecourse
to the academy, her resolve remains unwavering.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I won't ever lose again!

And so, with a determination bordering on
obsession...

Biwa Hayahide sets her sights on the final race of
the Classic Triple Crown tour—the Kikuka Sho.
